mapper.select:
SELECT io_id AS ioId, io_type AS ioType, io_reason AS ioReason, io_vendor AS ioVendor, io_lot AS ioLot, io_qty AS ioQty, io_date AS ioDate, io_worker AS ioWorker, io_msg AS ioMsg FROM io
AND io_type = #{ioType}
AND io_date >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND io_date < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND ( UPPER(io_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(io_lot) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(io_vendor) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )
ORDER BY io_date DESC

SELECT io_id AS ioId, io_type AS ioType, io_reason AS ioReason, io_vendor AS ioVendor, io_lot AS ioLot, io_qty AS ioQty, io_date AS ioDate, io_worker AS ioWorker, io_msg AS ioMsg FROM io WHERE io_id = #{ioId}
SELECT item_id AS itemId, item_name AS itemName, item_type AS itemType FROM item WHERE item_type = #{itemType} AND item_usage = 'Y' ORDER BY item_name ASC
SELECT vendor_id AS vendorId, vendor_name AS vendorName FROM vendor WHERE vendor_usage = 'Y' ORDER BY vendor_name ASC

SELECT LOT_ID AS lotId, LOT_ITEM AS lotItem, LOT_FQTY AS lotFqty, LOT_EXP AS lotExp, LOT_STATUS AS lotStatus FROM LOT WHERE LOT_ITEM = #{itemId} AND LOT_FQTY > 0 AND LOT_STATUS IN (10, 20) ORDER BY LOT_EXP ASC, LOT_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO io ( io_id, io_type, io_reason, io_vendor, io_lot, io_qty, io_date, io_worker, io_msg ) VALUES ( #{ioId}, #{ioType}, #{ioReason}, #{ioVendor}, #{ioLot}, #{ioQty}, SYSDATE, #{ioWorker}, #{ioMsg} )
